description: Composition100% cotton shirt with half sleeves, has plaid checks in shades of brown, with red-mustard-white accents, brown stitch detailing, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, one snap button at the bottom of the placket, buttoned patch pockets on both chest, buttoned shoulder flaps, full length buttoned placket and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this plaid shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
